canvas.$description: Light canvas — Frost is the thinking space

surface.$description: Light surface — Sand warms the panels

primary.$description: High-emphasis text on light — 16.3:1 on canvas (AAA)

secondary.$description: Medium-emphasis text on light — 8.3:1 on canvas (AAA)

muted.$description: Low-emphasis text on light — 4.9:1 on canvas (AA). Cool tint recedes into the frost canvas; ink-3 fails on light (3.15:1)

accent.$description: Accent-colored text on light — the deep stop, 6.4:1 on canvas (AA). Mirrors dark mode's use of magenta-4 (the light stop)

cool.$description: Cool technical tone on light — a tuned saturated blue (5.95:1 on canvas, AA). The sky ramp is intentionally desaturated and its only AA-on-light stop (sky-2) reads as near-black navy with no pop; links and code-syntax need a confident blue that's clearly distinct from the near-black body text. Dark mode's cool is sky-4 (airy light blue); each mode tunes cool for its ground
